title: Tens of thousands evacuated from French tourist spot as wildfires spread
summary_full: The fire has raged in the region for several days with officials now ordering the evacuation of the entire Cap Ferret peninsula.
summary_public: The fire has raged in the region for several days with officials now ordering the evacuation of the entire Cap Ferret peninsula.
